activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

oracleReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT
    poh.proj_id project_id,
    proj.description Project_Title,
    r.r_id,
    r.r_code requisition_no,
    r_nls.short_desc Req_Short_Desc,
    r_nls.Description Req_Desc,
    r.r_supp req_rev,
    TO_CHAR(r.created_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') req_created_date,
    TO_CHAR(r.rel_to_proc_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') released_to_proc,
    TO_CHAR(r.approved_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') req_approved_date,
    TO_CHAR(r.proc_acknowledge_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') proc_ack_date,
    poh.po_number,
    poh.po_supp po_rev,
    (SELECT description from m_sys.m_po_header_nls WHERE poh_id=poh.poh_id AND nls_id=1 AND ROWNUM<2) po_title,
    MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_PO_STATUS(poh.poh_id, 'N') po_status,
    MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_PO_STATUS_DATE(poh.poh_id, 'N') status_date,
    TO_CHAR(poh.approved_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') po_approved_date,
    TO_CHAR(poh.po_issue_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') po_issue_date,
    ROUND(tc.total_price+NVL(tc.tax_amount,0),2) total_cost_po,
    (SELECT unit_code FROM m_sys.m_units WHERE unit_id=poh.currency_id AND ROWNUM<2) currency_po,
    ROUND(MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_AMOUNT_USD(r.proj_id, SYSDATE,tc.currency_id,(tc.total_price+NVL(tc.tax_amount,0))),2) total_in_usd,
    (SELECT company_name FROM m_sys.m_companies WHERE company_id=ms.company_id AND ROWNUM<2) supplier_name,
    ms.sup_code supplier_code,
    (SELECT description FROM m_sys.m_country_nls WHERE cy_id=ms.cy_id AND nls_id=1 AND ROWNUM<2) supplier_location,
    (SELECT job_number  FROM m_sys.m_jobs WHERE job_id=poh.job_id AND ROWNUM<2) account_code_po
FROM
    m_sys.m_reqs r,
    m_sys.m_req_nls r_nls,
    m_sys.m_po_headers poh,
    m_sys.m_projects proj,
    m_sys.m_po_total_costs tc,
    m_sys.m_overview_suppliers ms,
    (SELECT r_id, poh_id
        FROM
        (
          SELECT DISTINCT min_r_id r_id, min_poh_id poh_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY base_poh_id ORDER BY min_r_id DESC) row_num
          FROM 
          (
              SELECT MIN(get_r.r_id) min_r_id, MIN(poh.poh_id) min_poh_id, poh.base_poh_id
                FROM
                  (SELECT r.r_id, CONNECT_BY_ROOT r_id as this_is_root
                    FROM m_sys.m_reqs r
                       WHERE r.proj_id  = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'
                          AND r.actual_ind = 'Y'
                          AND r.approved_date is not null  --TR
                          START WITH last_r_id IS NULL
                          CONNECT BY last_r_id = PRIOR r.r_id
                  ) get_r,
                   m_sys.m_req_to_pos rp,
                   m_sys.m_po_headers poh
          WHERE rp.proj_id     = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'
                AND   rp.proj_id = poh.proj_id
                AND   rp.rli_id IS NULL
                AND   ( rp.rli_id IS NULL AND poh.order_type <> 'SC' OR poh.order_type = 'SC')
                AND   rp.r_id        = get_r.r_id
                AND   rp.base_poh_id = poh.base_poh_id
                AND m_sys.m_pck_config_custom.mdr_get_po_status(poh.poh_id) <> 'CANCELLED'  -- remove cancelled POs
                GROUP BY this_is_root, poh.base_poh_id
          )
          )
          WHERE row_num < 31) req_po
      WHERE poh.proj_id = r.proj_id
      AND poh.proj_id = proj.proj_id
      AND r.r_id = r_nls.r_id
      AND r_nls.nls_id = 1
      AND r.r_id        = req_po.r_id
      AND r.actual_ind = 'Y'
      AND poh.poh_id    = req_po.poh_id
      AND poh.sup_id    = ms.sup_id(+)
      AND poh.poh_id    = tc.poh_id(+)
ORDER BY project_id, po_number
